pi_items.source: Verified against the task description and OpenBCI GUI documentation which confirm 'EMG' is the target widget.
Task description directly specifies that only channels 7 and 8 should remain active.
Task description explicitly lists channels 1 through 6 to be turned off in the EMG widget.
OpenBCI GUI EMG widget displays one signal bar per active channel; hence 2 active channels yield exactly 2 bars.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates exclusively on synthetic data using OpenBCI GUI's 'SYNTHETIC (algorithmic)' session. No external data files are involved. The metadata claims are fully verified against the task instructions and application behavior: the agent is expected to configure the 'EMG' widget to isolate exactly two channels (channels 7 and 8), meaning exactly 2 active signal bars should be visible, while channels 1 through 6 are explicitly turned off.
